'''''Star Wars Science Adventures''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] junior novel series written by [[Jude Watson]] and [[K.D. Burkett]]. The series includes the books [[Star Wars Science Adventures: Emergency in Escape Pod Four|''Emergency in Escape Pod Four'']] and [[Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X|''Journey Across Planet X'']], which were published simultaneously in [[February]] [[1999]] by [[Scholastic]]. ''Star Wars Science Adventures'' did not receive a third entry, and its story was left unresolved.

The series is set in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], and it follows [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], science droid [[4B-X]], and a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] kid named [[Stuart Zissu]] as they go on a science-based adventure. The novels also include activities which demonstrate physics from the story.

{{Book-stub}}
